data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Minimizes user decision time by simplifying choices.
data.technical_spec: Streamlined UI design for faster interaction and decision-making.

data.title: Fitts' Law
data.description: Optimizes the placement of icons and buttons for ease of access.
data.technical_spec: Ensures target size and position facilitate quick user actions.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Focuses on visual appeal to enhance perceived usability.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes clean, modern design aesthetics to improve user experience.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Designs for user expectation by aligning with familiar interfaces.
data.technical_spec: Incorporates known patterns and navigation methods from popular apps.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Groups related elements together to create meaningful associations.
data.technical_spec: Applies spacing and alignment for logical grouping of UI components.
